category: Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information
description: Custom errors (Solidity 0.8.4+) save gas but can expose internal state if parameters include sensitive data (e.g., balances, private keys, internal addresses). Using the wrong error in a revert can also mislead integrators or hide the actual failure reason. Custom errors are part of the revert payload and can be decoded off-chain.
name: Misuse of Custom Errors Leading to Information Leakage or Wrong Revert Behavior
remediation: - Avoid including sensitive data in custom error parameters. - Use generic error messages for external-facing reverts when the internal reason is confidential. - Ensure error selection matches the actual failure condition.
